name: Richard Wildee III
notes: I am planning on retiring in 2024 from a job of 34yrs. Something I can do using my brain instead of my hands and put my kids in position. Learn how to do government contracting as a middleman, alone with other areas that can be a good fit for someone that have no GovCon experience. The best way to invest in the future of my family for generations to come. These are some of the basic plans I want to accomplish from this call.
